title: steenisia pterosepala
intro: Steenisia pterosepala, also known as the Steenisia tree, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia, and its leaves and stems are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections. Steenisia pterosepala is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues.
